case_title: CACH LLC VS. EVANGELINA P. SANTOS

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANTS DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15153073) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC HEARING SET FOR JUL-06-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANTS DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, EVANGELINA P. $4,214.85 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,304.85, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon Tang, of Neuheisel Law Firm, Tel. 510.896.9411, for plaintiffs;
Evangelina Santos, in pro per, Tel. 415.240-5429, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
